description_long: This is a white low-top sneaker with a thick, platform-style sole and a rounded toe. The shoe features a green and red web stripe on the side, adorned with an embroidered gold bee, a signature motif of Gucci. The heel tab is green with the brand name 'GUCCI' printed in white, and the interior lining appears to be tan or light brown. The shoe is equipped with white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern and has a smooth, clean finish with minimal visible stitching. The sole is solid and slightly raised, with small cutouts along the edge, and the overall appearance is pristine and high-end.
description: A white platform sneaker with green and red web stripes, gold bee embroidery, and a green 'GUCCI' heel tab, featuring white laces and a thick, smooth sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green and red web stripe with gold bee embroidery and the green heel tab.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, white laces, and clean, smooth upper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the web stripe without the bee embroidery and the platform sole.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the green heel tab with 'GUCCI' branding and the solid heel structure.
attribute_logo: Gold bee embroidery on the side web stripe; 'GUCCI' text on the green heel tab.
